source: Project 2: Ad Generator — highest performing static ads (this year)
creative_angle: Bullet/checkmark format: specificity (date, weeks, sessions, points), urgent CTA

ad_copy.primary_text: May 2nd SAT. 8 weeks away. 2 sessions a week. 16 sessions total. That is about 200+ points. Start this week.
ad_copy.headline: 200+ Points. Start This Week.

brief.audience: Parents and students with SAT test date in sight

notes: Clean static: light purple gradient, checkmarks per line, CTA highlighted; specificity (date, 200+ points) drives performance.
